name: Zurich day trip with city tour, boat trip and Lindt Home of Chocolate
description: Discover Zurich day trip with city tour, boat trip and Lindt Home of Chocolate in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Zurich day trip with city tour, boat trip and Lindt Home of Chocolate in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Lindt Home of Chocolate: Experience the fascinating world of the cocoa plant in the museum.
Lindt Home of Chocolate: Selfie with chocolate fountain and friends in the visitor area.
Lindt Home of Chocolate: modern museum with chocolate tasting and family outing.
Lindt Home of Chocolate: happy mother with daughter in a chocolate world with colorful pralines.
Zurich: Fountain at the lakeshore, boats, and promenade in summer, a beautiful place for relaxation.
Lake Zurich: The ship MS Albis sails on the sparkling water of Lake Zurich.
Zürich Old Town: picturesque view of the Limmat with historic buildings and the Fraumünster Church.
Zürich Old Town: Boat on the Limmat, historic buildings and gentle riverside promenade.
Zurich Old Town: charming houses along the Limmatquai by the river in the city of Zurich
Zurich Old Town: Historical architecture at Münsterhof Square with cafés and outdoor guests.
